source: R datasets::ChickWeight — Crowder & Hand 1990 repeated-measures chick growth experiment; 578 observations, 50 chicks, 4 diets, 12 time points
notes: Control study: Diet 3 consistently outperforms Diet 2 in both early and late growth phases when measuring weight > 150g. Balanced design (60 observations per cell). No reversal: time phase is a confound in direction only (weights naturally increase with age) but does not flip the diet comparison.
